results.question: Which regions have the most weekly reports in the year 2022?
results.expected_answer:
FL | 52
HHS Region 2 (NJ, NY) | 52
HHS Region 3 (DE, DC, MD, PA, VA, WV) | 52
CT | 52
HHS Region 1 (CT, ME, MA, NH, RI, VT) | 52
HHS Region 10 (AK, ID, OR, WA) | 52
NV | 52
NY | 52
OK | 52
OH | 52
full_expected_items: HHS Region 3 (DE, DC, MD, PA, VA, WV) | 52
HHS Region 1 (CT, ME, MA, NH, RI, VT) | 52
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?region_name (COUNT(?report) AS ?report_count)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview>
WHERE {
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/reported_in_region> ?region .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Region> .
  ?region <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_name> ?region_name .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/year> "2022" .
}
GROUP BY ?region_name
ORDER BY DESC(?report_count)
LIMIT 10

results.question: How many weekly reports are associated with each season?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?season_label (COUNT(?report) AS ?report_count)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview>
WHERE {
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/in_season> ?season .
  ?season <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Season> .
  ?season <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/season_label> ?season_label .
}
GROUP BY ?season_label
ORDER BY DESC(?report_count)

results.question: What are the region types and the number of distinct seasons associated with regions of that type?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?regionTypeName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) AS ?numberOfSeasons) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview> WHERE {
  ?regionType <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/RegionType> .
  ?regionType <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_type_name> ?regionTypeName .
  ?regionType <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_type_includes> ?region .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Region> .
  ?region <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/region_has_report> ?report .
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/in_season> ?season .
  ?season <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Season> .
} GROUP BY ?regionTypeName ORDER BY DESC(?numberOfSeasons)

results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?regionLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?ageGroup) AS ?ageGroupCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview> WHERE {
  ?report <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/WeeklyReport> .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/year> "2022" .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/reported_in_region> ?region .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/Region> .
  ?region <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?regionLabel .
  ?report <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/pred/age_breakdown_for_report> ?ageGroup .
  ?ageGroup <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-cdc-fluview/type/AgeGroup> .
} GROUP BY ?regionLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?ageGroupCount)

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table WeeklyReport: 18122 rows (from WeeklyReport.csv)
CREATE TABLE "WeeklyReport" (
  "report_id" TEXT,
  "region_code" TEXT,
  "season_id" TEXT,
  "epiweek" INTEGER,
  "year" INTEGER,
  "week_number" INTEGER,
  "num_ili" INTEGER,
  "num_patients" INTEGER,
  "num_providers" INTEGER,
  "weighted_ili_pct" REAL,
  "unweighted_ili_pct" REAL,
  "num_age_0_4" INTEGER,
  "num_age_5_24" INTEGER,
  "num_age_25_49" TEXT,
  "num_age_50_64" INTEGER,
  "num_age_65_plus" INTEGER,
  "num_age_unknown" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from WeeklyReport:
--   report_id='hhs1-201940', region_code='hhs1', season_id='2019-2020', epiweek='201940', year='2019', week_number='40', num_ili='1261', num_patients='130089', num_providers='255', weighted_ili_pct='0.892224', unweighted_ili_pct='0.969336', num_age_0_4='247', num_age_5_24='404', num_age_25_49='', num_age_50_64='324', num_age_65_plus='174', num_age_unknown='112'
--   report_id='hhs2-201940', region_code='hhs2', season_id='2019-2020', epiweek='201940', year='2019', week_number='40', num_ili='2994', num_patients='195431', num_providers='263', weighted_ili_pct='2.13358', unweighted_ili_pct='1.532', num_age_0_4='945', num_age_5_24='884', num_age_25_49='', num_age_50_64='642', num_age_65_plus='242', num_age_unknown='281'

-- Table Region: 62 rows (from Region.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Region" (
  "region_code" TEXT,
  "region_name" TEXT,
  "region_type" TEXT,
  "region_type_id" TEXT,
  "report_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Region:
--   region_code='ak', region_name='AK', region_type='State', region_type_id='state', report_count='294'
--   region_code='al', region_name='AL', region_type='State', region_type_id='state', report_count='294'

-- Table Season: 6 rows (from Season.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Season" (
  "season_id" TEXT,
  "season_label" TEXT,
  "report_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Season:
--   season_id='2019-2020', season_label='2019-2020', report_count='3172'
--   season_id='2020-2021', season_label='2020-2021', report_count='3233'

-- Table AgeGroup: 6 rows (from AgeGroup.csv)
CREATE TABLE "AgeGroup" (
  "age_group_id" TEXT,
  "age_group_label" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from AgeGroup:
--   age_group_id='age_0_4', age_group_label='0-4 years'
--   age_group_id='age_5_24', age_group_label='5-24 years'

-- Table RegionType: 3 rows (from RegionType.csv)
CREATE TABLE "RegionType" (
  "region_type_id" TEXT,
  "region_type_name" TEXT,
  "region_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from RegionType:
--   region_type_id='hhs_region', region_type_name='HHS Region', region_count='10'
--   region_type_id='national', region_type_name='National', region_count='1'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   AgeGroup.age_group_id -> WeeklyReport.report_id
--   Region.region_code -> RegionType.region_type_id
--   Region.region_code -> WeeklyReport.report_id
--   RegionType.region_type_id -> Region.region_code
--   Season.season_id -> WeeklyReport.report_id
--   WeeklyReport.report_id -> AgeGroup.age_group_id
--   WeeklyReport.report_id -> Region.region_code
--   WeeklyReport.report_id -> Season.season_id
